sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince geometric optimal portfolio: derive optimal_f from intersection of slope=1 line with AHPR efficient frontier. Maximizes long-term wealth growth via geometric mean HPR optimization. Specific f value not provided in excerpt—must be calculated from historical one-trade expectations and efficient frontier analysis.

source_rule_text: Size positions using the geometric optimal portfolio where a line from origin with slope 1 intersects the AHPR efficient frontier to maximize long-term wealth growth.
